sourceMovie.title: Icefall
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Icefall (2025) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Stefan Ruzowitzky's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The International
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Icefall clicked for you, The International (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Icefall?
faq.answer: Try The International, The Last Days of American Crime, Shade—each shares DNA with Icefall while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Icefall?
faq.answer: Icefall (2025) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Icefall worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
